stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
A Boeing 737-900 with 160 seats is carrying out a domestic commercial air transport flight, with a scheduled traffic load of 18 230 kg. However, a connecting flight is delayed and so 6 adults and 2 children will miss the flight along with 110 kg of their baggage. What will be the final Traffic Load now, if the Operator uses "all adult" standard masses?
